'''matazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pwca|pwca]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-t-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pwca|pwca]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| matazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || mætæzhæth || mætæzhæj || mætæzhæsh || mætæzhæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || matatazhath || matatazhaj || matatazhash || matatazha
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || matazhath || matazhaj || matazhash || matazha
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || matafzhafth || matafzhafj || matafzhafsh || matafzhaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || matazhatha || matazhaja || matazhasha || matazhaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || matazhath || matazhaj || matazhash || matazha
|-
| [[Possessive]] || matazhathal || matazhajal || matazhashal || matazhakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || matazhaathatha || matazhaajaja || matazhaashasha || matazhaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || matazhathan || matazhajan || matazhashan || matazhakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || matazhathaoro || matazhajaoro || matazhashaoro || matazhakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
